title: ECR
description: Fully managed container image registry. Stores, manages, and deploys Docker container images. Integrates natively with ECS and Lambda for image pulls.
practices: Use ECR instead of public Docker Hub in production — faster pulls, no rate limits, and image scanning included.
Enable image scanning on push to catch known vulnerabilities before deployment.
Set lifecycle policies to clean up old/untagged images — ECR storage costs add up over time.
Use immutable image tags in production to prevent accidental overwrites of deployed images.
configNotes: Image scanning can be enabled on push (recommended).
Lifecycle policies control how many images are retained.
